transcript.content: Hi, I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment for tomorrow afternoon please.
Thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! Would you prefer our Bannerghatta Road (Medax) branch or the Wilson Garden (Arc) branch for your appointment tomorrow afternoon?
Oh, whichever branch has an available slot is fine by me.
One moment, let me check the schedule for tomorrow afternoon. Sorry, the clinic is closed on Sundays, so we’re not open tomorrow. Would you like to book an appointment for Monday afternoon instead?
Oh, I see. Yes, Monday afternoon works for me.

Let me check Monday afternoon slots for you. We have Monday afternoon slots available at both branches. Would you like twelve noon at Bannerghatta Road with Dr. Gopika, twelve noon at Wilson Garden with Dr. Anamika, or one o’clock at Wilson Garden with Dr. Pooja?
I’ll go with the twelve noon slot at Bannerghatta Road with Dr. Gopika, please.
Great, may I have your full name—first and last—for the booking?
Sure, it's Vikram Malhotra.
Thank you. I have written your name as Vikram Malhotra — is that correct?
Yes, that's correct. Thank you!

One moment, booking your appointment. Your appointment is confirmed for Monday, twentieth July at twelve noon with Dr. Gopika at our Bannerghatta Road branch. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you for your help!
You’re most welcome, Vikram. We look forward to seeing you on Monday. Have a great day! Goodbye!
Thank you! Goodbye!
Thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy. Goodbye and take care!

arguments.execution_message: One moment, let me check the schedule for tomorrow afternoon.
Let me check Monday afternoon slots for you.
One moment, booking your appointment.

transcript.content: Hello, I'd like to book an appointment this week.

I’m flexible, so any day and time this week works for me.

transcript.content: Hi, this is Aditya Iyer — I want to book a physiotherapy session for tomorrow evening, around five or six.

Namaste Aditya! Thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy. May I know which branch you prefer — Bannerghatta Road (Medax) or Wilson Garden (Arc)? If you tell me where you live or work, I can suggest the closer branch.
Uh, I live near Bannerghatta Road, so I guess that branch would be better.
One moment, let me check the evening slots for tomorrow. Aditya, our Bannerghatta Road branch is closed on Sundays, so we’re not open tomorrow. Would you like to book for Monday evening instead?
Wait, am I talking to a robot? I just said I wanted it for tomorrow. Can’t you check again?

Yes, I’m Asha, the AI assistant for Arogya Physiotherapy. I help with all appointment bookings. 

Tomorrow is Sunday, and our clinic is closed every Sunday. Would you like to look at Monday evening slots at the Bannerghatta Road branch?
I already told you my name is Aditya Iyer! Yes, fine, let’s go for Monday evening then. What slots do you have?

Let me check Monday evening slots for you. Aditya, on Monday evening at our Bannerghatta Road branch, we have a five o’clock slot with either Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi or Dr. Gopika Nair. Would you like to book with one of them?
I just said my name is Aditya Iyer! Uh, yeah, I’ll take the five o’clock slot with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi.

Booking your slot now. Your appointment is confirmed, Aditya Iyer — Monday, 20th July at five o’clock in the evening, Bannerghatta Road branch, with Dr. Pooja Pandey Tripathi. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

जी, किस branch में appointment चाहिए — Bannerghatta Road (Medax) या Wilson Garden (Arc)?

transcript.content: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment for next week please.
Thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy! Which branch would you prefer for your appointment — Bannerghatta Road or Wilson Garden?
Any branch is fine, I’m flexible.
Got it, thank you. Which day next week would you prefer for your appointment?
I’m good with any day next week.

One moment, let me check the schedule for next week. Here are the earliest available slots next week: Monday, twentieth July, ten fifteen in the morning at Bannerghatta Road branch with either Dr. Gopika Nair or Dr. Dilpreet Kaur, or eleven o’clock at Wilson Garden branch with Dr. Anamika Lyngdoh. Would you like to book one of these?
Yes, I’d like to book the appointment on Monday at ten fifteen with Dr. Gopika Nair, please.
Great, I’ll book you for Monday, twentieth July, ten fifteen in the morning at our Bannerghatta Road branch with Dr. Gopika Nair. May I have your full name, please?
Three Watch Toshniwal.
Sorry, I didn’t catch that name clearly. Could you please repeat your full name, or spell it out for me?
Oh, sorry! It’s Shrivatsa Toshniwal.
Thank you. I have written your name as Shrivatsa Toshniwal — is that correct?
Yes, that’s correct.

One moment, booking your appointment. Your appointment is confirmed for Shrivatsa Toshniwal on Monday, twentieth July, ten fifteen in the morning at our Bannerghatta Road branch with Dr. Gopika Nair. The consultation fee is four hundred rupees.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that’s all. Thank you!
Thank you for calling Arogya Physiotherapy. Have a great day! Goodbye!

latency.caveat: Latency values are Retell-measured per-call percentiles aggregated across calls. Retell's e2e EXCLUDES the caller-side network leg: callers dialing from India over the US number (or WebRTC from India) experience roughly +250-350ms on top of these figures. ASR component latency is not separately exposed by the platform; it is included in e2e.
